rationale: The cited paper studies visual ad-format effects (progression vs. before/after) via process simulation, credibility, and persuasion, which is conceptually adjacent to the citing paper’s focus on dynamic visual cues in video advertising. However, the provided evidence is only a single DOI-level match with no in-text citation context, and the citing note does not explicitly identify this specific work as a core mechanism or method source. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop but also not strong enough to clearly keep.
